para_trans: Administrative approval for the foreign Tour of Smt. Vinita Ved Single, IAS, Principal Secretary (Disaster Management, Relief and Rehabilitation)| Shri. Aman Mittal, TAS, Joint CEO, MITRA and Shri.Ayush Prasad, IAS, Collector Nashik to participate in the Emergency Preparedness and Response Academy in Tokya and Sendai, Japan.
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department
Governatent Resolution No. Manik-2026/C.R.42/Manik-02
Hutatma Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Road,
Mantralaya, Mumbai-32
Date: 15th April, 2026
Ref: 1. General Administration Dept. Govt. Memo. No. PRDO-1420/CR.26/11.dt. 01 Feb,2021.
2. General Administration Dept. Govt. Memo. No.PRDO -1425/CR.95/DE-1. dt. 21 Aug,2025.
Preamble:-
The World Bank has invited the Government of Maharashtra to participate in the "Emergency Preparedness and Response Academy in Tokya and Sendai, Japan " during April
20-24, 2026. The Hon'ble Chief Minister approved nomination of Smt. Vinita Ved Singal,
IAS, Principal Secretary (Disaster Management, Relief and Rehabilitation Department), Shri.
Aman Mittal, IAS, Joint CEO and P.D., MITRA and Shri. Ayush Prasad, IAS, Collector,
Nashik for above said programme.
The Government Résolution:
Administrative approval is hereby accorded for nomination of the Smt. Vinita Ved
Singal, IAS, Principal Secretary (Disaster Management, Relief and Rehabilitation
Department), Shri. Aman Mittal, IAS, Joint CEO, MITRA and Shri. Ayush Prasad, IAS,
Collector, Nashik in "Emergency Preparedness and Response Academy in Tokya and Sendai, Japan " to be held during 18 April 2026 to 26 April 2026 (including travel period) in Japan.
02. All Expenses for the visit, such as air travel , visa, Stay arrangement etc. will be borne by the World Bank
03. The entire period of the said foreign tour will be considered as the duty period.
04. The concerned officers have been provided with medical insurance through the
department. Also, it has been ensured that medical insurance cover, medical treatment in case of an infectious disease like Covid.
05. | Nominated officers should submit a detailed visit report for the programme they have attended as per the given order, within the period of three months.
06. This Government Resolution is issued with the Concurrence of General
Administration Department , Government of Maharashtra.
07. This Government Resolution 15 published on _ official website
www.maharashtra.gov.in of Government of Maharashtra and its Reference   no is
